summary: The diff implements most of the required functionality across backend and frontend. The backend (main.mo) includes profile registration with coordinator notification logic, and frontend hooks for approve/reject verification call resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications. The NotificationsDashboard renders faculty approval cards. However, due to truncation of backend/main.mo and NotificationsDashboard.tsx, some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified. One notable concern is that the Notification type in backend/main.mo does not appear to include coordinator principal or action-tag fields needed for REQ-1 AC-2, and the resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications backend method is not visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each faculty notification must contain the coordinator's name, email, and principal, and be tagged so the frontend can render Approve/Reject actions.
missing_requirements.reason: The Notification type shown in backend/main.mo only has fields: id, title, content, timestamp, isRead. There is no coordinatorPrincipal field or action-tag field visible in the type definition. Without these, the frontend cannot reliably extract the coordinator's principal to call approve/reject from the notification itself.

missing_requirements.requirement: A backend method resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications must exist that removes or marks as resolved the coordinator's pending-approval notification for ALL faculty principals.
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend hooks call actor.resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications, but the backend/main.mo file is truncated and this method is not visible in the shown portion. Cannot confirm the backend implementation exists.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added with a run function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration module or data migration requirement. This file was added without any corresponding requirement.
